items.title: Ο Σύλλογος Συγγενών Θυμάτων Τεμπών καταγγέλλει προσπάθεια αναβολής της δίκης επ’ αόριστον

lead.title: ‘Suddenly, I Was Free’: A Chinese Pastor’s Journey From Jail to the U.S.
lead.snippet: In his first interview since being released by China, Pastor Ezra Jin Mingri details his surprise release after a direct appeal by President Trump to Xi Jinping.

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Hits Bridges and a Port in Country’s South, Iranian Media says
items.snippet: The U.S. military’s Central Command said the latest round of attacks had “hit dozens of Iranian military targets” but made no mention of civilian infrastructure.

items.title: How Andy Burnham, ‘King of the North,’ Conquered U.K. Politics
items.snippet: A plain-spoken politician from a modest background in northwest England, Mr. Burnham became Labour leader — and Britain’s incoming prime minister — on Friday.

items.title: The 20-Somethings Running Ukraine’s War Machine
items.snippet: A new generation has been cutting red tape to speed weapons to the front. But the old guard pushed back, and now Ukraine’s young defense minister is out.

items.title: Hundreds of Rohingya Feared Drowned at Sea
items.snippet: Members of the persecuted minority group from Myanmar set off in search of a better life weeks ago, but news of their boats sinking only emerged recently. More than 500 are feared dead.

items.title: As Blazes Spread Near Paris, Extreme Heat Is Changing How France Fights Fires
items.snippet: Until recently, France’s forest fires were mostly in the south. This week, fires are raging much farther north. France is having to rethink its firefighting strategy.

items.title: Dubai Migrant Worker Layoffs Reveal Costs of Middle East War
items.snippet: The Persian Gulf city attracted migrant workers with the promise of opportunity. Many now say the war has brought job losses and salary cuts.

items.title: A Russian Political Battle Ends With a Visit From Masked Men
items.snippet: Boris B. Nadezhdin, an outspoken opponent of the war in Ukraine, says he knows why he was detained: “Among our leadership, there is panic and chaos.”

items.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Force a Grim Homecoming for Migrants
items.snippet: Mass migration, which defines modern Venezuela, has heavily marked the earthquake, too, saving many who had left, but also making their grief harder.

items.title: Japan Passes New Law Banning Flag Desecration in Nationalist Push
items.snippet: The new law is part of a campaign by Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, a hard-line conservative, to build a more patriotic and assertive Japan. Critics say it undermines free speech.

items.title: Philippines Condemns AI Video Posted by Chinese State Media Depicting It as a Monkey
items.snippet: It lodged a diplomatic complaint with Beijing over an A.I.-generated video centered on territorial disputes in the South China Sea.

items.title: How Andy Burnham Becomes Britain’s New Prime Minister
items.snippet: Andy Burnham is set to officially become the next prime minister on Monday, but a number of things have to happen before then. Here’s how everything is expected to play out.

items.title: Ukraine’s Ousted Defense Minister Attacks the Military’s Old Guard
items.snippet: Mykhailo Fedorov defended his efforts to modernize the Ukrainian armed forces as thousands of people protested his dismissal.

items.title: In Iran war, Trump Risks Another American ‘Forever War’
items.snippet: President Trump, who promised to “end wars,” not start them, may have fallen into a familiar presidential trap.

items.title: Iran-U.S. Talks: How 4 Negotiators Would Approach Diplomacy
items.snippet: First step: Agree on a goal.

lead.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
lead.snippet: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.

items.title: San Francisco mayor pushes for tougher rules after the Waymo traffic fiasco
items.snippet: In the wake of a massive hours-long gridlock event, San Francisco mayor Daniel Lurie has told state regulators it's time to put more requirements on robotaxi operators like Waymo.

items.title: SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition
items.snippet: The company didn't immediately say what went wrong. SpaceX's stock plunged more than 4% in after-hours trading before paring losses.

items.title: Coca-Cola suspended production at its Fairlife dairy after a ransomware attack
items.snippet: Coca Cola said dairy production at its Fairlife unit will "remain suspended" in the United States following a hack.

items.title: Founders Fund hires former OpenAI exec Ryan Beiermeister (and not because of her ‘Mafia’ skills)
items.snippet: Ryan Beiermeister, who demonstrated cool analysis in the Founders Fund YouTube series "Mafia," has joined the firm as a partner.

items.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
items.snippet: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

items.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
items.snippet: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

items.title: Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years
items.snippet: BP Ventures is shutting down, ending a nearly 20-year run that was marked by reportedly lackluster returns.

items.title: Uber’s $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint
items.snippet: Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company’s global footprint and create one of the world’s largest food-delivery platforms outside China.

items.title: Newsletter platform Beehiiv now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI
items.snippet: Beehiiv is launching an AI Copilot to help publishers with user growth and analytics.

items.title: X cracks down on creators who steal content
items.snippet: X will use Grok AI to better detect stolen content, redirect payouts to original creators, and crack down on engagement bait.

items.title: AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
items.snippet: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.

items.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
items.snippet: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

items.title: Google continues its renaming streak by turning NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
items.snippet: Google said users can soon access their notebooks through AI Mode in Search.

items.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
items.snippet: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

lead.title: Το τεράστιο κενό του Πινέδα και η εμπιστοσύνη στον Ριμπάλτα!

items.title: Εθνική Νέων: Το τρίπτυχο που οδήγησε στην «υπέρβαση» της 8άδας!
items.snippet: Ο Αντώνης Καλκαβούρας σχολιάζει την πορεία του αντιπροσωπευτικού συγκροτήματος κάτω των 20 ετών στο Eurobasket της Σλοβενίας κι εξηγεί γιατί ανεξάρτητα με την θέση που θα καταλάβει (5-8), είναι ήδη πετυχημένη!

items.title: Ολυμπιακός: Ρόλο στην ακαδημία για τους Πάουλο Νόγκα και Φρανσίσκο Βελέζ σύμφωνα με τους Πορτογάλους
items.snippet: Ο Αντόνιο Μιγκέλ Καρντόσο έχει πιάσει ήδη... δουλειά στον Ολυμπιακό και σύμφωνα με τους Πορτογάλους, έχει δώσει βασικό ρόλο για την ακαδημία στους Πάουλο Νόγκα και Φρανσίσκο Βελέζ.

items.title: Η METRO είναι μία από τις Most Admired Companies στην Ελλάδα
items.snippet: Η METRO διακρίθηκε ως μία από τις Most Admired Companies στην Ελλάδα, τον θεσμό του Fortune Greece που αναδεικνύει τις επιχειρήσεις με την ισχυρότερη φήμη και την υψηλότερη εκτίμηση από την αγορά.

items.title: Τζίμας: Επέστρεψε στις προπονήσεις της Μπράιτον

items.title: Ducati Power Deals με όφελος έως 5.000 ευρώ
items.snippet: Με τέτοιο όφελος τιμής, το όνειρο αγοράς μια Ducati έρχεται για πρώτη φορά τόσο κοντά στην πραγματικότητα.

lead.title: Christopher Nolan on ‘The Odyssey’ and IMAX Technical Challenges
lead.snippet: He and the cinematographer Hoyte van Hoytema combined new inventions (like fire-mimicking lights they developed) with century-old techniques.

items.title: Will SpaceX’s 13th Test Flight of Starship Be Lucky?
items.snippet: The 33 engines of the rocket’s booster stage had begun to ignite during Thursday’s launch attempt, but were then shut down. SpaceX will try again on another day.

items.title: Why Does Wildfire Smoke Turn the Sky Orange?
items.snippet: It’s about how light scatters in our atmosphere.

items.title: The Burning, Bleeding, Breathing Art of Ana Mendieta

items.title: Astronomers Find an Atmosphere on a Nearby Earthlike Planet
items.snippet: It’s the first potentially habitable world known to host an atmosphere, making it a lead contender in the search for life beyond our solar system.

items.title: The Rediscovery of Country Original Gary Stewart
items.snippet: Gary Stewart spent a few years on top, but was largely forgotten after his tragic death in 2003. Now a new generation is rediscovering the onetime “king of honky-tonk.”

items.title: Archaeologists Unearth a 2,400-Year-Old Sanctuary for the Worship of Odysseus
items.snippet: The ruins of a 2,400-year-old complex suggest that, to the Greeks of antiquity, Homer’s protagonist was not just a character in a poem but a figure of genuine devotion.

items.title: ‘Heartstopper Forever’ Review: Facing a Grown-Up Reality
items.snippet: The glossy Netflix series graduates into adulthood with this movie starring Kit Connor and Joe Locke as a couple with thoughts of college ahead.

items.title: Meet Earth’s Newest Monkey. (And Check Out Its Orange Lips.)
items.snippet: It is only the fifth new African monkey identified as a new species in the past 75 years.

items.title: ‘Heartstopper Forever’: What to Know Before Seeing the Movie
items.snippet: The Netflix series and its feature-length finale are based on the graphic novels by Alice Oseman. Here’s a reminder of the events of the characters and where their stories left of.

items.title: New Jersey Couple Aids Meteorite Discovery After it Crashes Through Their Roof
items.snippet: A New Jersey couple helped scientists uncover the makeup of an unusual asteroid after it fell into their bedroom.

items.title: My 5 Favorite Places for Art in Venice
items.snippet: Our critic Jason Farago shares what you shouldn’t miss in a city full of secrets and surprises.

items.title: New Winged Robot Can Fly and Swim Like a Puffin
items.snippet: Inspired by the physical feats of diving birds, researchers have created a robot that can plunge into the water and flap back into the air.

items.title: The Internet’s Steve Lacy, Syd and Matt Martians Discuss New Music
items.snippet: The band members Steve Lacy and Syd, both of whom have new solo albums out now, reunite with the producer Matt Martians to discuss achieving TikTok fame, writing a Beyoncé song and staying a family.
